title: Cozy Indoor Meditation Space with Cushions, Candles, and Plants
description: A warm and inviting indoor meditation corner featuring a large gray floor cushion topped with a smaller beige cushion and a rust-colored throw blanket. The space includes lit candles, incense sticks emitting smoke, a wooden bench with potted plants, abstract wall art, and natural light streaming through a window with sheer curtains. The setting is calm and minimalist, designed for mindfulness and relaxation.
